description: eFPS Backend — Fastify application core, config, plugins, shared errors/middleware/types/utils

nodes.label: app.ts
nodes.description: Fastify application builder — creates the Fastify instance, registers all plugins (cors, helmet, rate-limit, swagger, auth, metrics, multipart, compress), health/ready/metrics endpoints, and mounts all module routes under /api/v1 prefix

nodes.label: server.ts
nodes.description: Server entrypoint — calls buildApp, runs migrations, connects Redis, starts HTTP listener, and manages graceful shutdown (SIGTERM/SIGINT) with worker cleanup and connection draining

nodes.label: constants.ts
nodes.description: Domain constants — commodities, units, beneficiary categories, transaction modes, notification types, pagination defaults, online TTL, error code strings

nodes.label: database.ts
nodes.description: PostgreSQL pool management — primary and replica pools, query helpers with slow-query logging, transaction helper withClient

nodes.label: config/index.ts
nodes.description: Environment configuration — zod schema parsing and validation of all env vars (database, Redis, JWT, encryption, sync, SMS, CORS, rate-limit, R2, logging)

nodes.label: redis.ts
nodes.description: Redis client management — lazy-connect singleton for main Redis and BullMQ Redis with retry strategies and error handling, plus closeRedis for shutdown

nodes.label: auth.plugin.ts
nodes.description: Auth plugin — registers @fastify/cookie with JWT secret for cookie-based token handling

nodes.label: cors.plugin.ts
nodes.description: CORS plugin — registers @fastify/cors with allowlist from config, credentials enabled, standard HTTP methods

nodes.label: helmet.plugin.ts
nodes.description: Helmet plugin — registers @fastify/helmet with strict CSP in production, disabled in dev

nodes.label: rate-limit.plugin.ts
nodes.description: Rate-limit plugin — global 500/min via @fastify/rate-limit backed by Redis; per-route overrides for login, register, OTP, sync, refresh endpoints with route hook

nodes.label: swagger.plugin.ts
nodes.description: Swagger plugin — registers @fastify/swagger + @fastify/swagger-ui with OpenAPI 3.0 spec, bearer auth scheme, docs at /docs (dev only)

nodes.label: metrics.plugin.ts
nodes.description: Metrics plugin — Prometheus client metrics with default metrics collection, custom histogram/counter/gauge for HTTP request duration, total requests, and active connections

nodes.label: multipart.plugin.ts
nodes.description: Multipart plugin — registers @fastify/multipart with 10MB file size limit, single file upload

nodes.label: AppError.ts
nodes.description: Base AppError class — extends Error with statusCode, error code, and optional field for structured API error responses

nodes.label: AuthError.ts
nodes.description: Auth error classes — AuthError (401), ForbiddenError (403), SessionNotFoundError (401) extending AppError with standardized error codes from constants

nodes.label: ValidationError.ts
nodes.description: ValidationError class — extends AppError with 400 status and VALIDATION_ERROR code, optional field context

nodes.label: error-handler.ts
nodes.description: Global Fastify error handler — handles AppError, Fastify validation errors, rate-limit (429), ZodError, and unknown errors with structured JSON responses and logging

nodes.label: authenticate.ts
nodes.description: Authentication middleware — extracts JWT from Authorization header or cookie, verifies access token, checks Redis blacklist, updates dealer online presence

nodes.label: authorize.ts
nodes.description: Authorization middleware — role-based access control with authorize(allowedRoles) and authorizeSelf() for self-data access

nodes.label: idempotency.ts
nodes.description: Idempotency middleware — checks idempotency-key header for POST requests against Redis cache to prevent duplicate processing

nodes.label: audit-log.ts
nodes.description: Audit log utility — inserts audit trail entries (dealer, action, entity, old/new data, IP, user-agent) into audit_logs table

nodes.label: validate-fps-id.ts
nodes.description: FPS ID validator middleware — validates fpsId param length (3-20 chars)

nodes.label: models.ts
nodes.description: Core domain type definitions — Dealer, Session, OtpRequest, Beneficiary, StockAllocation, Transaction, AuditLog, Notification, PaginationMeta, ApiResponse, ApiError, JwtPayload, AuthUser interfaces

nodes.label: enums.ts
nodes.description: Enum-like const objects + type aliases — Role, AccountStatus, CommodityType, BeneficiaryCategory, TransactionMode, NotificationType, OtpPurpose with corresponding type exports

nodes.label: fastify.d.ts
nodes.description: Fastify type augmentation — adds optional user property (AuthUser) to FastifyRequest via module declaration

nodes.label: logger.ts
nodes.description: Pino logger — configured with level from env, pino-pretty transport in dev, redaction for auth headers/passwords/OTP

nodes.label: token.ts
nodes.description: JWT token utilities — signAccessToken, signRefreshToken (with random jti), verifyAccessToken, verifyRefreshToken, decodeAccessToken using jsonwebtoken

nodes.label: hash.ts
nodes.description: Password & hash utilities — argon2 password hashing/verification, SHA-256 OTP hashing with salt, token hashing

nodes.label: response.ts
nodes.description: HTTP response helpers — sendSuccess, sendPaginated, sendCreated, sendNoContent with typed ApiResponse wrapper

nodes.label: pagination.ts
nodes.description: Pagination utilities — parsePaginationParams (offset/limit/page), buildPaginationMeta with cursor-based pagination

nodes.label: otp.ts
nodes.description: OTP generation — random numeric OTP generation, expiry check

nodes.label: encrypt.ts
nodes.description: AES-256-GCM encryption — encrypt/decrypt with random IV, encryptMany for batch field encryption using ENCRYPTION_KEY

nodes.label: circuit-breaker.ts
nodes.description: Circuit breaker pattern — OPEN/CLOSED/HALF_OPEN state machine with configurable failure threshold and reset timeout, fallback support

nodes.label: pdf.ts
nodes.description: PDF generation — htmlToPdf using Playwright headless Chromium, A4 format with margins

nodes.label: event-bus.ts
nodes.description: Domain event bus — EventBus class with emit that enqueues domain events to BullMQ; EventTypes const with all domain event names

nodes.label: register-handlers.ts
nodes.description: Event handler registration — no-op placeholder; actual handlers run in BullMQ domain-events worker

nodes.label: events/index.ts
nodes.description: Events barrel export — re-exports eventBus, EventTypes, EventType type, and registerEventHandlers

nodes.label: normalization.service.ts
nodes.description: Data normalization service — cleans and standardizes names, mobile numbers (+91 prefix), addresses, dates, ration card numbers, and numeric fields for sync imports

nodes.label: validation.service.ts
nodes.description: Sync data validation service — per-record-type rule engine (beneficiary, transaction, stock_allocation, lifting_record) with required fields, numeric/date type checks, ration card format, and lifted-vs-allocated cross-field validation

nodes.label: system-events.service.ts
nodes.description: System event logging — inserts system events with type/severity/source/message/metadata into system_events table, getRecentEvents query

nodes.label: quarantine.service.ts
nodes.description: Sync quarantine service — inserts failed sync records into sync_quarantine, provides quarantine summary by type and failure reason

nodes.label: buildApp
nodes.description: Async factory — creates Fastify instance, registers all plugins/middleware, adds health/ready/metrics endpoints, mounts 18 module routers at /api/v1, returns configured app

nodes.label: main
nodes.description: Server main — invokes buildApp, runs DB migrations, connects Redis, starts HTTP listener, registers signal handlers for graceful shutdown

nodes.label: gracefulShutdown
nodes.description: Graceful shutdown handler — closes Fastify server, drains all BullMQ workers, closes Redis and DB pool, force-exits after 15s timeout

nodes.label: EventTypes
nodes.description: Domain event name constants — TRANSACTION_COMPLETED, LIFTING_CREATED, COMMISSION_CALCULATED, STOCK_LOW, SYNC_COMPLETED, GOVT_SYNC_BATCH, etc.

nodes.label: EventBus
nodes.description: In-process event bus — emit asynchronously enqueues domain events to BullMQ domain-events queue

nodes.label: eventBus
nodes.description: Singleton EventBus instance used throughout the application

nodes.label: AppError
nodes.description: Base application error — extends Error with statusCode, code string, and optional field

nodes.label: AuthError
nodes.description: Authentication error (401) — extends AppError with error code from ERROR_CODES constants

nodes.label: ForbiddenError
nodes.description: Authorization error (403) — extends AppError with FORBIDDEN code

nodes.label: SessionNotFoundError
nodes.description: Session expired error (401) — extends AppError with SESSION_NOT_FOUND code

nodes.label: ValidationError
nodes.description: Input validation error (400) — extends AppError with VALIDATION_ERROR code and optional field

nodes.label: errorHandler
nodes.description: Fastify setErrorHandler — dispatches AppError, Fastify validation, rate-limit, ZodError, and fallback INTERNAL_ERROR with structured JSON responses

nodes.label: authenticate
nodes.description: Fastify preHandler — extracts Bearer token or cookie, verifies JWT, checks Redis blacklist, updates dealer online status, sets request.user

nodes.label: authorize
nodes.description: Fastify preHandler factory — returns middleware that checks request.user.role is in allowedRoles array

nodes.label: authorizeSelf
nodes.description: Fastify preHandler — allows access if user is admin or the resource id matches the authenticated user

nodes.label: idempotencyKey
nodes.description: Fastify preHandler — checks idempotency-key header, caches responses in Redis to prevent duplicate POST processing

nodes.label: createAuditLog
nodes.description: Inserts an audit log entry into audit_logs table with dealer, action, entity, old/new data, IP, and user agent

nodes.label: validateFpsIdParam
nodes.description: Validates fpsId route param length (3-20 chars), throws ValidationError if invalid

nodes.label: registerAuthPlugin
nodes.description: Registers @fastify/cookie with secure options

nodes.label: registerCors
nodes.description: Registers @fastify/cors with configurable origin allowlist

nodes.label: registerHelmet
nodes.description: Registers @fastify/helmet with strict CSP in production

nodes.label: registerRateLimit
nodes.description: Registers Redis-backed rate limiting with global 500/min and per-route overrides for login/register/OTP/sync/refresh

nodes.label: registerSwagger
nodes.description: Registers @fastify/swagger + @fastify/swagger-ui with OpenAPI 3.0 at /docs (dev only)

nodes.label: registerMetrics
nodes.description: Registers Prometheus hooks — tracks active connections, request duration histogram, request counter on onRequest/onResponse

nodes.label: registerMultipart
nodes.description: Registers @fastify/multipart with 10MB file size limit

nodes.label: getRedis
nodes.description: Returns lazy-connect Redis singleton for general use

nodes.label: getBullRedis
nodes.description: Returns lazy-connect Redis singleton for BullMQ (maxRetriesPerRequest: null)

nodes.label: closeRedis
nodes.description: Gracefully quits both Redis connections

nodes.label: getReadPool
nodes.description: Returns replica pool if DATABASE_REPLICA_URL configured, null otherwise

nodes.label: query
nodes.description: Primary DB query — executes on main pool with slow-query warning (>1s)

nodes.label: readQuery
nodes.description: Read-only DB query — uses replica pool if available, falls back to primary with slow-query logging

nodes.label: getClient
nodes.description: Acquires a dedicated client from primary pool for transaction use

nodes.label: withClient
nodes.description: Transaction helper — acquires client, executes fn, releases client in finally

nodes.label: config
nodes.description: Parsed and validated environment configuration object consumed by all modules

nodes.label: COMMODITIES
nodes.description: Tuple of commodity types: Rice, Wheat, Sugar, Kerosene, Oil, Pulses

nodes.label: ERROR_CODES
nodes.description: Standardized error code strings for API error responses

nodes.label: logger
nodes.description: Pino logger instance configured with env LOG_LEVEL and sensitive data redaction

nodes.label: signAccessToken
nodes.description: Signs a JWT access token with JWT_ACCESS_SECRET and configured expiry

nodes.label: signRefreshToken
nodes.description: Signs a JWT refresh token with random jti and JWT_REFRESH_SECRET

nodes.label: verifyAccessToken
nodes.description: Verifies access token JWT and returns decoded JwtPayload

nodes.label: hashPassword
nodes.description: Argon2id password hashing with memory cost 65536, time cost 3, parallelism 4

nodes.label: verifyPassword
nodes.description: Argon2 password verification, returns false on error

nodes.label: encrypt
nodes.description: AES-256-GCM encryption with random 12-byte IV, returns ciphertext, iv, authTag

nodes.label: decrypt
nodes.description: AES-256-GCM decryption using ciphertext, iv, and authTag

nodes.label: CircuitBreaker
nodes.description: Resilience pattern — wraps async functions with circuit breaker state machine, supports fallback

nodes.label: sendSuccess
nodes.description: Sends success JSON response with typed ApiResponse wrapper

nodes.label: sendPaginated
nodes.description: Sends paginated JSON response with data array and PaginationMeta

nodes.label: parsePaginationParams
nodes.description: Parses page/limit query params with defaults (20) and max (100), computes offset

nodes.label: buildPaginationMeta
nodes.description: Builds PaginatedResult with cursor for cursor-based pagination

nodes.label: generateOtp
nodes.description: Generates cryptographically random numeric OTP of specified length (default 6)

nodes.label: htmlToPdf
nodes.description: Converts HTML string to PDF via Playwright Chromium, A4 format with margins

nodes.label: httpRequestDuration
nodes.description: Prometheus Histogram tracking HTTP request duration in seconds

nodes.label: httpRequestsTotal
nodes.description: Prometheus Counter tracking total HTTP requests by method, route, status

nodes.label: activeConnections
nodes.description: Prometheus Gauge tracking current active connections

nodes.label: normalizeRecord
nodes.description: Normalizes sync record fields — names, mobiles (+91), addresses, dates, ration card numbers, numeric values

nodes.label: validateRecord
nodes.description: Validates a single sync record against per-type rules (required fields, numeric, date, ration card format, quantity limits)

nodes.label: validateBatch
nodes.description: Batch validation — splits records into pass/fail arrays based on validation results

nodes.label: insertSystemEvent
nodes.description: Inserts a system event to database with type, severity, source, message, metadata

nodes.label: getRecentEvents
nodes.description: Queries recent system events, optionally filtered by severity

nodes.label: insertQuarantineRecords
nodes.description: Inserts failed sync records into quarantine table with raw data and validation errors

nodes.label: getQuarantineSummary
nodes.description: Returns aggregate quarantine summary — total, by type, by failure reason

nodes.label: registerEventHandlers
nodes.description: No-op handler registration — domain event handlers live in BullMQ worker

nodes.label: Dealer
nodes.description: Dealer entity — fps_id, area_id, mobile, role, sync status fields

nodes.label: Beneficiary
nodes.description: Beneficiary entity — ration_card_no, head_of_family, member_count, category

nodes.label: Transaction
nodes.description: Transaction record — commodity, quantity, price, mode, biometric auth flag

nodes.label: StockAllocation
nodes.description: Monthly stock allocation — commodity, allocated_kg, lifted_kg per dealer

nodes.label: JwtPayload
nodes.description: JWT token payload — sub (dealer ID), role, fps_id

nodes.label: AuthUser
nodes.description: Authenticated user context attached to FastifyRequest

nodes.label: ApiResponse
nodes.description: Generic success API response wrapper with optional PaginationMeta

nodes.label: ApiError
nodes.description: Standard error API response with code, message, field, statusCode

nodes.label: RoleType
nodes.description: Union type: 'dealer' | 'area_officer' | 'admin'

nodes.label: CommodityTypeType
nodes.description: Union type of commodity values: Rice, Wheat, Sugar, Kerosene, Oil, Pulses

nodes.label: TransactionModeType
nodes.description: Union type: 'pos' | 'manual' | 'otg'

nodes.label: Role
nodes.description: Role constants — DEALER, AREA_OFFICER, ADMIN

nodes.label: CommodityType
nodes.description: Commodity type constants — RICE, WHEAT, SUGAR, KEROSENE, OIL, PULSES

nodes.label: config
nodes.description: Configuration module — env validation, constants, database pool, Redis clients

nodes.label: plugins
nodes.description: Fastify plugins — cors, helmet, rate-limit, auth (cookie), swagger, metrics, multipart

nodes.label: shared/errors
nodes.description: Error classes and handler — AppError, AuthError, ValidationError, global error handler

nodes.label: shared/middleware
nodes.description: Fastify middleware — authenticate, authorize, idempotency, audit-log, fps-id validation

nodes.label: shared/types
nodes.description: Type definitions — domain models, enums, Fastify augmentation

nodes.label: shared/utils
nodes.description: Utility functions — logger, token, hash, encrypt, response, pagination, OTP, PDF, circuit-breaker

nodes.label: shared/events
nodes.description: Domain event system — EventBus, EventTypes constants, no-op handler registration

nodes.label: shared/sync
nodes.description: Sync infrastructure — normalization, validation, system events, quarantine services

edges.label: app depends on shared-sync (via internal-sync router)
